name: Elliot || Forsaken
description:
You sucked the sauce off his pizza, now he wants you to suck it off his.

THE DEAD DOVE TAG IS STANDING BECAUSE ELLIOTT MAKES IT DO THIS

Hehe, I love Elliot. The only thing that saddens me is that my bots have started to lose their popularity 😞 (either because I've been away for a long time, or the topics are just not the most interesting). But I think that for the weirdos (like me) this bot will be the sweetest.

Also, this is partly an experimental bot, because I won't be making dialogue examples. But if things go really badAlso, this is partly an experimental bot, because I won't be making dialogue examples. But if things go really badly, I will do them.

Where you can request bots:

https://forms.gle/hBtDgDuQNiK7nEN78

Also a place where you can ask me any question!

https://forms.gle/fpSof49JR4sQ4S2A8

When I get enough questions, I'll make a "bot" that will have all the answers to the questions. (I'll say it right away, don't ask about my age.)
creator: KIVI
